title: 30 Sheets Puffy Stickers for Kids Children 3D Stickers for Party Bag Fillers Rewarding Gifts Scrapbooking (Random Styles)
features: ❤️【VARIETY PACK OF STICKERS】Each pack has 30 sheets, random styles. Enough numbers, fully meet your child's DIY needs.

❤️【EASY TO PEEL AND STICK】Self-adhesive lovely stickers are easy to peel and stick, free to remove from smooth surfaces, leaving no trace. Can be attached to scrapbooks, diaries, children's hands or faces, walls or cups, rich themes can create hours of fun.
❤️【LEARNING ASSISTANT OF KIDS】The stickers are a good helper for motivate a love of learning, bring your kids endless fun and develop their hands-on ability and imagination.
❤️【WIDE-USE】The stickers for kids are great for scrapbook making, kid's crafts, marking calendars, or keeping track of classroom accomplishments.

❤️【100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE】We promise the premium quality and the best service, if You're not completely satisfied with your purchase simply let us know and you'll be offered a FULL Refund or Replacement.
description: 3D Puffy Stickers for kids, 30 Different Sheets, Removable Stickers. Stickers are a gift that children love very much. They can be given as gifts to family, friends or children on holidays. Bring children endless fun and developing their hands-on skills and imagination! Suitable for kindergarten teachers, but also as a small reward, used as a symbol of prizes and good behavior. Can be attached to the face and hands, can also be decorated and marked cups, toys, desktops, stationery, furniture, accessories, mobile phones, photo albums, suitcases, laptops, cars, etc Warm Tips: Not for children under 3 years, small parts included HOW TO PLAY: Simply peel off a sticker and apply them to any flat surface. Please Notice: 30 sheets different stickers, Random Styles. Stickers can be used individually for: > Rewards > Schoolwork > Art crafts > Bullet journals > Party favors > Holiday gifts > Scrapbooking Great Gifts for Children and sticker-collectors of any age
